feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fehler beim Sichern von IH-Aufträgen mit OCI-Schnittstelle (DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR)
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

wir haben ein Problem beim Sichern von IH-Aufträgen. Der Fehler "DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR" tritt auf, sobald wir Komponenten in die Positionsliste des Auftrags einfügen. Dabei spielt es keine Rolle, ob es sich um Komponenten aus unserem OCI-Katalog handelt oder um reguläre SAP-Materialien. Auch nach der Freigabe des Auftrags können wir ihn nicht sichern.

Zunächst wird angezeigt, dass der Auftrag freigegeben wurde. Kehren wir dann jedoch zum SAP-Menü zurück, erscheint die genannte Fehlermeldung.

Das Sichern von Aufträgen ohne neu eingefügte Komponenten funktioniert problemlos.

Hat jemand eine Idee, woran das liegen könnte? Vielen Dank im Voraus für eure Hilfe!

entry.title: How to include Project System in Make-to-Stock process in Public cloud system?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently working with a client who wishes to integrate Project System into the Make-to-Stock process. As I have not yet had experience with this specific scenario, I would greatly appreciate your guidance on the process.

Your insights and support would be extremely valuable to me.

Thank you in advance for your help.

Best regards,
Souhardhya Sen

entry.title: How to get spare part list assigned to equipment BOM
entry.content:
hello everyone,

how to write logic to get spare part list which is assigned in equipment BOM.

entry.title: SAP S/4 Out-of-the-Box Functionality in Plant Maintenance and EHS – Std. Features vs. Add-On Licens.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am currently exploring SAP S/4HANA and would like to understand the out-of-the-box (standard) functionalities available in the Plant Maintenance (PM) and Environment, Health & Safety (EHS) modules, without requiring any additional licensing or add-ons cost. 

Specifically, I would like to know:

  1. Work Clearance Management (WCM) & Permit to Work – Are these included as standard features in SAP S/4HANA, or do they require a separate license?
  2. Standard EHS Functionalities – What key capabilities are provided by default for incident management, risk assessment, and compliance tracking?
  3. SAP Plant Maintenance (PM) Features – Which functionalities are pre-configured in areas like work order management, preventive maintenance, and resource scheduling?
  4. Integration & Enhancements – How does SAP S/4HANA handle cross-module integration (e.g., EHS & PM) without additional costs, and what enhancements are available within the standard system

entry.title: Table to find PR created from Ariba
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Can you please let me know the table to find PR created from Ariba

Thanks & Regards, 

Preethi Alevarthi

entry.title: Difference between Assignment of People and Assignment of Person responsible. ( RSH )
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

With the new 43R(RSH), users can assign people through the Maintenance Scheduling Board (F2603). After assignments are made and operations dispatched, these assignments do not appear in the Person Responsible tab of the Maintenance Order or in Perform Maintenance Job (ready to perform). To have the assignments reflected, users need to open the 'Assign Maintenance Order Operation' app (F3423) and manually assign a person responsible, or the technician has to self-assign using Perform Maintenance Job.

Question: What is the purpose of having an assignment option in the Maintenance Scheduling Board (F2603)?

Thanks,

R

entry.title: Maintenance plans with status "Scheduled Save to call "
entry.content:
Hi, how i can identify the maintenance plans with status "Scheduled Save to call "

Regards

entry.title: Guidance to configure PM Notification status for users to un-approve notifications after approval
entry.content:
Please I need guidance to configure PM Notification User status for users to un-approve notifications after approval. 

Once a notification has been approved, our planners on occasion need to un-approve to allow them to send back to initiator so they can make improvements and learn how to make a quality notifications.

entry.title: SAP PM Certification is retired, what to do because certification expires 31 March 2025
entry.content:
Good day all,

SAP PM Certification is retired, what to do because certification expires 31 March 2025

entry.title: Export download Issue - Find Technical Objects or Find Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Unlike ECC , S4 HANA Apps are not providing download of selected objects using export options ?

ECC Screen : Selected Item 8 , Output download 8 Items.

 

SAP S/4 HANA Fiori : Export download all objects 

Is there any workaround ? so Business can download selective data ?

BR.

R

entry.title: No Planning Tab in Display Maintenance Order Screen : SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content: No Planning Tab in Display Maintenance Order Screen : This is an issue for End User /business to view Planning data such as Maintenance Plan, Maintenance Item and Last Work Order created for Individual WO via Display Work Order app. What is alternative option offered by SAP in this case ?

entry.title: fleet management enhancement in Tcode IFCU
entry.content: I want to do the screen enhancement on transaction code IFCU screen to add the filed for external fleet of type p. However, i couldn't find any screen enhancement for it.

entry.title: how to get "installation & Dismantling" history of equipment
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

How can i get "installation & Dismantling" history of any equipment.

entry.title: Clarification on Work Clearance Management (WCM) in SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance Module
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am currently working on a business process document for Work Clearance Management (WCM) and need to outline the standard features and functionalities available out of the box in SAP S/4HANA. I understand that WCM requires additional licensing and includes the following capabilities:

  • Full electronic support for controlling hazardous work through permits and isolation procedures
  • Support for multiple levels of work permits and approvals
  • Management of operational lists, tags, and test tags within isolation procedures
  • A mobile app for WCM supporting Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedures

    Based on my research, I found that SAP provides a classic version of WCM, which is an out-of-the-box solution for SAP Plant Maintenance (PM). Can anyone confirm if this is accurate?

    Additionally, I am looking for detailed documentation or links regarding both the classic and enhanced versions of WCM.

    Lastly, I would like to know whether the following process steps attached align with the standard WCM solution within SAP PM, or if additional licensing and enhancements are required to cover them.

    Your insights and guidance would be greatly appreciated.

    Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Maintenance Scheduling process
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Can anyone help me in sharing SAP helpline portal of best practices information about Maintenance Scheduling process in plant maintenance. Which could cover steps of process and business process diagram to show the process and prepare a business process document 

Thanks

entry.title: Restricting transaction codes IW31, IW32, and IW33 at the order type level
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to restrict transaction codes IW31, IW32, and IW33 at the order type level. However, these transactions invoke the same authorization object, I_AUART, which contains only two authorization fields: WERKS and AUFART.

Could you confirm if there is an existing standard solution available for this requirement?

Looking forward to your response.

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Resource Scheduling with SAP Standard (Out-of-the-Box) Solution Without RSH/MRS
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Our client wants to explore out-of-the-box resource scheduling functionality in SAP S/4HANA without purchasing Resource Scheduling for Maintenance Planners (RSH) or Multi resource Scheduling (MRS) applications, as these require separate licenses.

Could anyone provide insights on the following?

  1. What is the business process flow for resource scheduling using only standard SAP functionalities like CM25 (Capacity Leveling) without RSH and MRS?
  2. Can we access or execute CM25 in the SAP Fiori environment?
  3. Are there any SAP articles or documentation explaining the limitations of CM25 compared to RSH?

Your guidance and references would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,
Sarvan Kumar

entry.title: Outline agreement price with respect to work order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have entered services in work order from Outline agreement and as well an individual service. So if we enter services other than Outline agreement services will the price of Outline agreement increase with respect to work order?

Thanks & Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: IP30 layout
entry.content:
In IP30 screen, some system have planning plant field, some system don't. I shared screenshots. Please let me know, how can I get planning plant field show the screen.

The system has 1909

The system has 2023 Hana.

entry.title: help me to configure G/L account determination based on Material Group
entry.content: G/L account determination based on Material Group for non stock material and external service procurement.
